Benchmark.title: Sanitized Chrome for Windows STIG-Style Example

Rule.title: Chrome Safe Browsing must be enabled
Rule.description: <VulnDiscussion>Browser protections help reduce exposure to known malicious sites and downloads.</VulnDiscussion>

check.check-content: Review Chrome enterprise policy in GPO or registry and confirm SafeBrowsingProtectionLevel is configured.

Rule.fixtext: Configure Chrome Safe Browsing through Group Policy or the registry policy path.

Rule.title: Chrome password manager must be disabled

check.check-content: Review Chrome policy and confirm PasswordManagerEnabled is set to disabled.

Rule.fixtext: Disable Chrome Password Manager using enterprise policy.

Rule.title: Deprecated Chrome cleanup policy must be reviewed

check.check-content: Review legacy Chrome cleanup policy settings.

Rule.fixtext: Remove or disable legacy Chrome cleanup configuration.
